name: [GRIDHAND] Win-Back Agent - No purchase/visit in 90 days → final attempt + survey

gridhand.scenario: No purchase/visit in 90 days → final attempt + survey
gridhand.description: When a customer hasn't made a purchase or visited a business, such as a gym, in 90 days, GRIDHAND's automation workflow is triggered to send a final attempt email via Mailchimp at 8am on the 91st day, containing a personalized message and a link to a survey on Google Forms to gather feedback on their experience. This email is the last in a series of targeted communications, and the survey responses are then synced with the business's CRM system, allowing the owner to analyze the results and identify areas for improvement. By leveraging this automation, the gym owner can re-engage dormant customers, gather valuable insights to inform marketing strategies, and potentially win back lost business, all without manual intervention.
